title: RealAI Tool Manifest
description: Schema for tool definitions registered in the RealAI tool registry.

name.description: Unique snake_case tool name used in tools_allowed lists.

description.description: What the tool does, including when to call it and what it returns.

version.description: Semver version of the tool implementation.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the arguments object the tool accepts.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the structure of the tool's return value.

safety.description: Safety classification and restrictions for this tool.

risk_level.description: Risk classification — used to enforce profile-based access.

requires_approval.description: Whether a human approval step is required before execution.

dry_run_supported.description: Whether the tool can simulate its action without side effects.

allowed_profiles.description: Access profiles permitted to call this tool.

examples.description: Example invocations for documentation and self-testing.
